positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a whimsical woodland scene, featuring a group of friendly, stylized forest animals (fox, owl, deer) gathered beneath giant, glowing bioluminescent mushrooms. The composition is centered and symmetrical, using clean vector art techniques with strong, defined silhouettes. The color palette is rich jewel tones—deep emerald, sapphire blue, amethyst purple, and glowing cyan—against a muted, dark forest background. The style should mimic modern Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock prints mixed with contemporary graphic design, ensuring high contrast, perfect clean lines, and suitability for textile printing. Perfect symmetry, central focus, visible print texture.
